user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of orientation programs with title, training mode, number of participants and status, so that I can track all scheduled orientations at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Program screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing orientation title, training mode, number of participants and status columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to schedule a new orientation, so that I can plan induction sessions for new employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Program screen; When I click Schedule Orientation and provide the details; Then a new orientation program is created and added to the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see the status of each orientation program, so that I know whether it is scheduled, in progress or completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Program screen; When I view a program row; Then its current status such as Scheduled is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to perform tasks against an orientation program from the Task column, so that I can act on individual orientations directly from the list
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Program screen; When I use the Task action for a program row; Then the corresponding task option is available for that orientation

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the orientation list, so that I can see the most up-to-date programs and participant counts
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Program screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the orientation programs and see item counts, so that I can navigate large numbers of orientations efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Orientation Program screen; When there are multiple programs; Then pagination controls and a displaying items count are shown
